subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sought illumination from the light of guidance! Praise thou God that He hath directed thee to the light of truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی حمد کن خدا را که تو را بنور حقیقت دلالت نمود و بدخول در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @personal instructions, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @being a source of light; guidance
